expo.name: KatChef
expo.description: KatChef turns fridge chaos into realistic AI-assisted meals across mobile and web.

plugins.photosPermission: KatChef uses your photo library so you can choose a profile avatar.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KatChef uses the camera to scan ingredients into your fridge.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: KatChef uses your photo library so you can scan ingredients and update your avatar.
